name: Delivery Type

labels.name: C&S
labels.description: Codes and Standards (C&S advocacy and related programs)

labels.name: DI
labels.description: Incentivizes the installation of an energy-efficient technology or service at a customer property by a program implementer managed third-party contractor or installer

labels.name: Down
labels.description: Incentivizes an energy-efficient technology or service to a participating customer for them to install or have installed

labels.name: Mid-Distr
labels.description: Incentivizes an energy-efficient technology through a program administrator partnership with the distributor

labels.name: Mid-Retail
labels.description: Incentivizes an energy-efficient technology through a program administrator partnership with the retailer

labels.name: Up-Manuf
labels.description: Incentivizes an energy-efficient technology through a program administrator partnership with the manufacturer

change_description: Synced automatically from CPUC Support Data using recipe Delivery Type
